subject: Product Management
title: Types of Product Managers
description: Learn Types of Product Managers in one minute.

hook.text: Not all PMs are the same. Growth PMs, platform PMs, and internal PMs do very different work.

buildup.text: Growth PMs optimize funnels and run experiments. Platform PMs build tools other teams use internally.

discovery.text: Core PMs own a user-facing product. Technical PMs work on infrastructure. Data PMs manage data products.

twist.text: The skills overlap, but the day-to-day is wildly different. A growth PM and a platform PM barely share a role.

climax.text: Understanding PM types helps companies hire the right one — and helps PMs find the right fit.

punchline.text: The title is the same. The job is not.

quiz.question: What distinguishes different types of product managers?
options: Their focus area — growth, platform, core, technical, or data
All PMs do exactly the same work
